name: Pricing

task.description: Build a cloud-hosting pricing page for 'NimbusCloud' at 1920px wide with BOTH a 3-tier card row AND a dense feature comparison table. Tiers: Starter $0/mo, Pro $29/mo (mark 'Most popular' with a colored top border), Business $99/mo. Each card lists price, a one-line tagline, a primary CTA button, and 4 bullet features. Below the cards, a comparison table with a left feature-name column and the three plan columns, at least 12 feature rows (e.g. 'Projects', 'Bandwidth', 'Build minutes', 'Team seats', 'Custom domains', 'SSL', 'Analytics', 'Priority support', 'SSO', 'Audit logs', 'SLA', 'Uptime') using checkmarks/dashes or values per cell. A FAQ section with 5 question rows below. Responsive: at 375px the three pricing cards stack vertically and the comparison table becomes horizontally scrollable within its own container (not the whole page).
requirements: Three pricing tier cards (Starter $0, Pro $29, Business $99) are equal width, top-aligned, in one row
The Pro card is marked 'Most popular' with a colored top border at least 4px
Each card shows price, tagline, a CTA button, and exactly four feature bullets
The comparison table has a feature-name column plus three plan columns, all aligned
The comparison table has at least 12 feature rows with a value or check/dash in every cell (no empty unaligned cells)
The FAQ section lists exactly five question rows
On desktop nothing overflows horizontally; the table fits within the page width
At 375px the three pricing cards stack into a single column
At 375px the comparison table scrolls horizontally within its own container, not forcing the whole page to scroll sideways
A consistent accent color is reused across the Pro highlight, CTAs, and table checkmarks

ss_html:
NimbusCloud

Simple, Transparent Pricing

Choose the perfect plan for your cloud hosting needs. Scale up or down anytime.

Starter

$0/mo

Perfect for personal projects and testing

  • 1 Project
  • 10GB Bandwidth
  • 100 Build minutes
  • Community support

Pro

$29/mo

Ideal for growing teams and businesses

  • 10 Projects
  • 100GB Bandwidth
  • 1,000 Build minutes
  • 5 Team seats

Business

$99/mo

Enterprise-grade features and support

  • Unlimited Projects
  • 1TB Bandwidth
  • 10,000 Build minutes
  • 25 Team seats

Feature Comparison

Features Starter Pro Business
Projects 1 10 Unlimited
Bandwidth 10GB 100GB 1TB
Build minutes 100 1,000 10,000
Team seats 1 5 25
Custom domains — ✓ ✓
SSL certificates ✓ ✓ ✓
Analytics — ✓ ✓
Priority support — ✓ ✓
Single Sign-On (SSO) — — ✓
Audit logs — — ✓
SLA guarantee — 99.9% 99.99%
Uptime monitoring — ✓ ✓

Frequently Asked Questions

Can I change my plan at any time?

Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect immediately, and we'll prorate any billing adjustments on your next invoice.

What happens if I exceed my bandwidth limit?

We'll notify you when you approach your limit. You can either upgrade your plan or purchase additional bandwidth. We never shut down your sites without warning.

Do you offer refunds?

We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee for all paid plans. If you're not satisfied, contact our support team for a full refund within the first 30 days.

Is there a setup fee?

No, there are no setup fees or hidden costs. The price you see is exactly what you'll pay, and you can start using our platform immediately after signup.

What payment methods do you accept?

We accept all major credit cards (Visa, MasterCard, American Express), PayPal, and bank transfers for Business plans. All payments are processed securely.

© 2024 NimbusCloud. All rights reserved.

Frequently Asked Questions

Can I change my plan at any time?
Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect immediately, and we'll prorate any billing adjustments on your next invoice.
What happens if I exceed my bandwidth limit?
We'll notify you when you approach your limit. You can either upgrade your plan or purchase additional bandwidth. We never shut down your sites without warning.
Do you offer refunds?
We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee for all paid plans. If you're not satisfied, contact our support team for a full refund within the first 30 days.

No, there are no setup fees or hidden costs. The price you see is exactly what you'll pay, and you can start using our service immediately after signup.

trace.output:
<think>
Let me build a comprehensive cloud-hosting pricing page for NimbusCloud with all the specified requirements.

Key design decisions:
- Color palette: Deep navy (#0F172A) background for header, white cards, accent color: electric blue/indigo (#6366F1) for Pro highlight, CTAs, checkmarks
- Clean, modern SaaS look
- Pro card gets a colored top border (accent color)
- Consistent typography using system fonts


- Structure includes a hero section, three pricing cards in a grid, a feature comparison table, and an FAQ section with accordion styling
- Using CSS Grid for the cards and table layout, flexbox for overall page structure
- Pro card will have a 4px top border in the accent color with subtle elevation
- Comparison table with a sticky first column for better mobile experience
- Responsive design that stacks cards vertically at 375px breakpoint and makes the table horizontally scrollable

Writing the HTML structure... Writing HTML and CSS styles... Still writing styles... Still writing styles... Still writing styles... Still writing styles... Still writing styles... Adding responsive styles... Writing the pricing table...
</think>
```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <title>NimbusCloud — Pricing</title>
  <style>
    /* ── Reset & Base ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

    :root {
      --accent:      #6366F1;
      --accent-dark: #4F46E5;
      --accent-pale: #EEF2FF;
      --navy:        #0F172A;
      --slate-800:   #1E293B;
      --slate-700:   #334155;
      --slate-500:   #64748B;
      --slate-400:   #94A3B8;
      --slate-200:   #E2E8F0;
      --slate-100:   #F1F5F9;
      --slate-50:    #F8FAFC;
      --white:       #ffffff;
      --radius-lg:   16px;
      --radius-md:   10px;
      --shadow-sm:   0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.07);
      --shadow-md:   0 8px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.13);
    }

    html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

    body {
      font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto,
                   'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif;
      background: var(--slate-50);
      color: var(--slate-800);
      font-size: 16px;
      line-height: 1.6;
      min-width: 320px;
    }

    /* ── Header ──────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    header {
      background: var(--navy);
      padding: 0 80px;
      height: 72px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
      position: sticky;
      top: 0;
      z-index: 100;
      border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06);
    }

    .logo {
      font-size: 22px;
      font-weight: 800;
      color: var(--white);
      letter-spacing: -.5px;
      white-space: nowrap;
    }
    .logo span { color: var(--accent); }

    nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 36px; }
    nav a {
      color: var(--slate-400);
      text-decoration: none;
      font-size: 14px;
      font-weight: 500;
      transition: color .2s;
    }
    nav a:hover { color: var(--white); }

    .nav-cta {
      background: var(--accent);
      color: var(--white) !important;
      padding: 9px 20px;
      border-radius: var(--radius-md);
      font-weight: 700 !important;
      font-size: 14px !important;
      transition: background .2s !important;
    }
    .nav-cta:hover { background: var(--accent-dark) !important; }

    /* ── Hero ────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    .hero {
      background: var(--navy);
      text-align: center;
      padding: 96px 80px 112px;
    }

    .hero-eyebrow {
      display: inline-block;
      font-size: 12px;
      font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: 2.5px;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--accent);
      background: rgba(99,102,241,.15);
      padding: 5px 14px;
      border-radius: 20px;
      margin-bottom: 20px;
    }

    .hero h1 {
      font-size: 60px;
      font-weight: 800;
      color: var(--white);
      letter-spacing: -2px;
      line-height: 1.08;
      margin-bottom: 18px;
    }
    .hero h1 span { color: var(--accent); }

    .hero p {
      font-size: 20px;
      color: var(--slate-400);
      max-width: 520px;
      margin: 0 auto 32px;
    }

    .toggle-row {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      gap: 14px;
      color: var(--slate-400);
      font-size: 14px;
      font-weight: 600;
    }
    .toggle-label { color: var(--white); }
    .save-badge {
      background: #10B981;
      color: var(--white);
      font-size: 11px;
      font-weight: 700;
      padding: 3px 9px;
      border-radius: 12px;
      letter-spacing: .5px;
    }

    /* ── Shared Section Chrome ───────────────────────────────── */
    .section-tag {
      text-align: center;
      font-size: 12px;
      font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: 2.5px;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--accent);
      margin-bottom: 10px;
    }
    .section-heading {
      text-align: center;
      font-size: 38px;
      font-weight: 800;
      color: var(--navy);
      letter-spacing: -1px;
      margin-bottom: 10px;
      line-height: 1.15;
    }
    .section-sub {
      text-align: center;
      font-size: 17px;
      color: var(--slate-500);
      margin-bottom: 56px;
    }

    /* ── Pricing Cards Section ───────────────────────────────── */
    .pricing-section {
      max-width: 1200px;
      margin: 0 auto;
      padding: 88px 60px 0;
    }

    /* cards grid */
    .cards-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr;
      gap: 28px;
      align-items: start;
    }

    /* card base */
    .card {
      background: var(--white);
      border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
      border: 1.5px solid var(--slate-200);
      padding: 44px 36px 40px;
      box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
      transition: box-shadow .25s, transform .25s;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
    }
    .card:hover {
      box-shadow: var(--shadow-md);
      transform: translateY(-3px);
    }

    /* Pro popular card */
    .card.popular {
      border-top: 5px solid var(--accent);
      border-left-color: var(--slate-200);
      border-right-color: var(--slate-200);
      border-bottom-color: var(--slate-200);
      padding-top: 40px;
    }

    .popular-badge {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 6px;
      background: var(--accent-pale);
      color: var(--accent);
      font-size: 11px;
      font-weight: 800;
      letter-spacing: 1.2px;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      padding: 5px 13px;
      border-radius: 20px;
      margin-bottom: 18px;
      align-self: flex-start;
    }
    .popular-badge::before { content: "★"; font-size: 10px; }

    .card-tier {
      font-size: 13px;
      font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: 1.5px;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--slate-500);
      margin-bottom: 10px;
    }

    .card-price-row { margin-bottom: 6px; display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 2px; }
    .card-price-sym {
      font-size: 24px;
      font-weight: 700;
      color: var(--navy);
      margin-top: 14px;
      line-height: 1;
    }
    .card-price-num {
      font-size: 62px;
      font-weight: 800;
      color: var(--navy);
      letter-spacing: -3px;
      line-height: 1;
    }
    .card-price-period {
      font-size: 14px;
      color: var(--slate-400);
      margin-bottom: 14px;
    }

    .card-tagline {
      font-size: 15px;
      color: var(--slate-500);
      line-height: 1.55;
      margin-bottom: 28px;
      min-height: 46px;
      flex-grow: 0;
    }

    .card-cta {
      display: block;
      width: 100%;
      padding: 14px 20px;
      border-radius: var(--radius-md);
      font-size: 15px;
      font-weight: 700;
      text-align: center;
      cursor: pointer;
      border: none;
      text-decoration: none;
      transition: all .2s;
      margin-bottom: 32px;
      letter-spacing: .2px;
    }
    .cta-primary   { background: var(--accent); color: var(--white); }
    .cta-primary:hover { background: var(--accent-dark); }
    .cta-secondary { background: var(--slate-100); color: var(--navy); }
    .cta-secondary:hover { background: var(--slate-200); }

    .card-divider {
      height: 1px;
      background: var(--slate-200);
      margin-bottom: 28px;
    }

    .card-features {
      list-style: none;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      gap: 14px;
    }
    .card-features li {
      display: flex;
      align-items: flex-start;
      gap: 10px;
      font-size: 15px;
      color: var(--slate-700);
      line-height: 1.45;
    }
    .feat-icon {
      color: var(--accent);
      font-size: 17px;
      font-weight: 900;
      flex-shrink: 0;
      margin-top: 1px;
    }

    /* ── Comparison Table Section ────────────────────────────── */
    .comparison-section {
      max-width: 1200px;
      margin: 0 auto;
      padding: 88px 60px 88px;
    }

    .table-wrapper {
      overflow-x: auto;
      -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
      border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
      border: 1.5px solid var(--slate-200);
      background: var(--white);
      box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
    }

    .comparison-table {
      width: 100%;
      border-collapse: collapse;
      min-width: 700px;
    }

    /* table head */
    .comparison-table thead th {
      padding: 30px 28px 26px;
      text-align: center;
      vertical-align: bottom;
      background: var(--slate-50);
      border-bottom: 2px solid var(--slate-200);
    }
    .comparison-table thead th:first-child {
      text-align: left;
      width: 30%;
    }

    .th-inner { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 4px; }
    .th-tier  { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 1.5px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--slate-500); }
    .th-name  { font-size: 20px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--navy); letter-spacing: -.3px; }
    .th-price { font-size: 26px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--navy); letter-spacing: -1px; line-height: 1; }
    .th-mo    { font-size: 13px; color: var(--slate-400); font-weight: 500; }

    /* Pro column header highlight */
    .th-pro {
      border-top: 5px solid var(--accent);
      background: rgba(99,102,241,.035);
    }

    /* table body */
    .comparison-table tbody tr { border-bottom: 1px solid var(--slate-100); }
    .comparison-table tbody tr:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
    .comparison-table tbody tr:nth-child(odd) { background: var(--white); }
    .comparison-table tbody tr:nth-child(even){ background: rgba(248,250,252,.6); }
    .comparison-table tbody tr:hover { background: var(--accent-pale); }

    .comparison-table tbody td {
      padding: 17px 28px;
      font-size: 15px;
      color: var(--slate-700);
      text-align: center;
      vertical-align: middle;
    }
    .comparison-table tbody td:first-child {
      text-align: left;
      font-weight: 600;
      color: var(--navy);
      font-size: 14.5px;
    }
    .comparison-table tbody td.col-pro {
      background: rgba(99,102,241,.04);
    }

    .chk  { color: var(--accent); font-size: 20px; font-weight: 900; }
    .dash { color: var(--slate-300); font-size: 22px; font-weight: 700; }
    .val  { font-size: 14.5px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--slate-700); }
    .val-accent { font-size: 14.5px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--accent); }

    /* group rows */
    .row-group td {
      background: var(--navy) !important;
      color: var(--slate-400) !important;
      font-size: 11px !important;
      font-weight: 700 !important;
      letter-spacing: 1.5px !important;
      text-transform: uppercase !important;
      padding: 10px 28px !important;
      text-align: left !important;
    }

    /* ── FAQ Section ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
    .faq-section {
      max-width: 800px;
      margin: 0 auto;
   

… [truncated, 15,624 more characters]

trace.feedback:
Quality score: 20%
DOES NOT MEET REQUIREMENTS

Issues found:
  1. [CRITICAL] Only partial pricing section visible - missing feature bullets, CTA buttons, and complete card content (at bottom)
  2. [CRITICAL] Comparison table completely missing from view (at not visible)
  3. [CRITICAL] FAQ section completely missing from view (at not visible)
  4. [MAJOR] Pro card 'Most popular' highlight border not visible or present (at center)
  5. [MAJOR] Pricing cards appear to have unequal widths - Starter and Business cards look narrower than Pro card (at bottom)
  6. [CRITICAL] Required feature bullets (4 per card) not visible in current view (at bottom)
  7. [CRITICAL] CTA buttons missing from all pricing cards (at bottom)

Suggested fixes:
  1. Ensure all three pricing cards have equal width and proper top alignment
  2. Add the colored top border (at least 4px) to mark the Pro card as 'Most popular'
  3. Include exactly four feature bullets under each pricing card
  4. Add CTA buttons to each pricing card
  5. Implement the comparison table with feature-name column and three plan columns
  6. Add the FAQ section with exactly five question rows
  7. Ensure the complete layout fits within the page width without horizontal overflow

Looking at the feedback, the main issues seem to be that the page content isn't fully visible - things are getting cut off or not rendering. This might be due to the page being too tall or some CSS issue causing content to not display. Let me analyze what could cause these issues:

1. The cards might have content being hidden due to overflow or height constraints
2. The comparison table and FAQ might be hidden due to CSS issues

Looking at the previous HTML more carefully, I think the issue might be that the viewport is being cut or something is causing the page to not render fully. 

The feedback about the pricing cards being cut off at the bottom suggests the flex layout or card height constraints might be clipping content. Since the comparison table and FAQ are completely missing, this could be a rendering issue, a z-index problem with the sticky header overlapping content, or the cards being cut off in the viewport during a screenshot. Let me reconsider what might cause those sections to disappear entirely. Looking at the card styling, I'm noticing the border declarations might be conflicting - the general `border` property and then the `border-top` override could be causing the "Most popular" accent line to not display properly on the pro card.

Checking the grid layout, the three-column setup should distribute equal widths, though the padding differences between cards shouldn't affect their overall width - this might just be a viewport issue where the screenshot didn't capture the full layout.

The real problem seems to be that content below a certain point isn't rendering at all. I'm wondering if there's a `max-width` constraint or overflow issue cutting off the comparison table and FAQ section entirely. <html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <title>NimbusCloud — Pricing</title>
  <style>
    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

    :root {
      --accent:      #6366F1;
      --accent-dark: #4F46E5;
      --accent-pale: #EEF2FF;
      --navy:        #0F172A;
      --slate-800:   #1E293B;
      --slate-700:   #334155;
      --slate-500:   #64748B;
      --slate-400:   #94A3B8;
      --slate-200:   #E2E8F0;
      --slate-100:   #F1F5F9;
      --slate-50:    #F8FAFC;
      --white:       #ffffff;

      --radius-md:   10px;

      --shadow-md:   0 8px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.13);
    }

    html, body {
      width: 100%;
      overflow-x: hidden;
    }

    body {
      font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto,
                   'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif;
      background: var(--slate-50);
      color: var(--slate-800);

      min-width: 320px;
    }

    /* ── Header ── */

    .nav-cta {
      background: var(--accent) !important;

      padding: 9px 20px;
      border-radius: var(--radius-md);
      font-weight: 700 !important;
    }
    .nav-cta:hover { background: var(--accent-dark) !important; }

    /* ── Hero ── */
    .hero {
      background: var(--navy);
      text-align: center;
      padding: 80px 80px 96px;
    }
    .hero-eyebrow {
      display: inline-block;
      font-size: 12px;

    /* ── Section labels ── */

    /* ── Pricing Section ── */
    .pricing-section {
      background: var(--slate-50);
      padding: 88px 0 88px;
    }
    .pricing-inner {
      max-width: 1200px;
      margin: 0 auto;
      padding: 0 60px;
    }

    /* ── Cards Grid ── */
    .cards-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr;
      gap: 28px;
      align-items: start;
      width: 100%;
    }

    /* ── Card base ── */
    .card {
      background: var(--white);
      border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
      border: 1.5px solid var(--slate-200);
      padding: 40px 36px 40px;
      box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      width: 100%;
    }

    /* ── Pro popular card — colored top border ── */
    .card.popular {
      border-top: 6px solid var(--accent);
      border-right: 1.5px solid var(--slate-200);
      border-bottom: 1.5px solid var(--slate-200);
      border-left: 1.5px solid var(--slate-200);
      padding-top: 34px;
    }

    .popular-badge {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 6px;
      background: var(--accent-pale);
      color: var(--accent);
      font-size: 11px;
      font-weight: 800;
      letter-spacing: 1.2px;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      padding: 5px 13px;
      border-radius: 20px;
      margin-bottom: 16px;
      align-self: flex-start;
    }

    .card-tier { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 1.5px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--slate-500); margin-bottom: 10px; }

    .card-price-row { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 2px; margin-bottom: 6px; }
    .card-price-sym { font-size: 24px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--navy); margin-top: 14px; line-height: 1; }
    .card-price-num { font-size: 62px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--navy); letter-spacing: -3px; line-height: 1; }
    .card-price-period { font-size: 14px; color: var(--slate-400); margin-bottom: 16px; }

    .card-tagline { font-size: 15px; color: var(--slate-500); line-height: 1.55; margin-bottom: 28px; }

    /* ── CTA buttons ── */
    .card-cta {
      display: block;
      width: 100%;
      padding: 14px 20px;
      border-radius: var(--radius-md);
      font-size: 15px;
      font-weight: 700;
      text-align: center;
      cursor: pointer;
      border: none;
      text-decoration: none;
      margin-bottom: 28px;
      letter-spacing: .2px;
    }
    .cta-primary   { background: var(--accent); color: var(--white); }
    .cta-primary:hover { background: var(--accent-dark); }
    .cta-secondary { background: var(--slate-100); color: var(--navy); }
    .cta-secondary:hover { background: var(--slate-200); }

    .card-divider { height: 1px; background: var(--slate-200); margin-bottom: 28px; }

    /* ── Feature bullets ── */
    .card-features { list-style: none; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 14px; }
    .card-features li { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 10px; font-size: 15px; color: var(--slate-700); line-height: 1.45; }
    .feat-icon { color: var(--accent); font-size: 17px; font-weight: 900; flex-shrink: 0; margin-top: 1px; }

    /* ── Comparison Table Section ── */
    .comparison-section {
      background: var(--white);
      padding: 88px 0 88px;
    }
    .comparison-inner {
      max-width: 1200px;
      margin: 0 auto;
      padding: 0 60px;
    }

    .table-wrapper {
      overflow-x: auto;
      -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
      border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
      border: 1.5px solid var(--slate-200);
      background: var(--white);
      box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
      display: block;
      width: 100%;
    }

    .comparison-table {
      width: 100%;
      border-collapse: collapse;
      table-layout: fixed;
      min-width: 700px;
    }

    .comparison-table thead th {
      padding: 28px 24px 24px;
      text-align: center;
      vertical-align: bottom;
      background: var(--slate-50);
      border-bottom: 2px solid var(--slate-200);
    }
    .comparison-table thead th:first-child {
      text-align: left;
      width: 32%;
    }
    .comparison-table thead th:not(:first-child) { width: 22.67%; }

    .th-inner { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 3px; }
    .th-tier  { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 1.5px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--slate-500); }

    .th-price { font-size: 26px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--navy); letter-spacing: -1px; line-height: 1; }
